description: Patch installed oh-my-claudecode runtime for better third-party model/proxy compatibility

rules.description: Relax deny guidance to prefer inherit/configured routing over hard failure wording
Avoid forcing provider-specific models into Claude tier aliases in delegation runtime
Prefer inherit/configured models over hardcoded tier aliases in agent registry
Remove explicit model=haiku|sonnet|opus and tier-suffixed agent examples from autopilot runtime prompt builders
Keep team routing config-driven and avoid stronger Claude-default fallback than necessary
Preserve provider-specific Claude worker models where possible
Remove explicit model=haiku|sonnet|opus examples from skill docs that drive runtime behavior
Replace agent frontmatter model fields with inherit-friendly defaults
